name: I missed a couple days after work injury but no doctor—can I still claim?
description: Yes, report and see doctor ASAP.[1][3]

mainEntity.name: I missed a couple days after work injury but no doctor—can I still claim?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, report and see doctor ASAP.[1][3]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, but see doctor now and report retroactively; minor injuries need reporting for future issues.[1][3] Utah 180 days.[1] Key factors: No bill yet? Still file; late medical weakens but possible. Practical guidance: Get evaluated, explain to doc; employer reports even first-aid beyond. Document lost time.
